case_title: WEINRESS, CHRIS et al VS MONCRIEF, BETTY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $825.33 FILED BY WEINRESS, CHRIS LESSIN, ERIC AS TO DEFENDANT MONCRIEF, BETTY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT MONCRIEF, BETTY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT WEINRESS, CHRIS LESSIN, ERIC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MONCRIEF, BETTY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,348.96 FILED BY MONCRIEF, BETTY AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT WEINRESS, CHRIS LESSIN, ERIC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-21-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEINRESS, CHRIS LESSIN, ERIC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONCRIEF, BETTY $123.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $138.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF WEINRESS, CHRIS
